ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain name of the website */,
  "tld" TEXT /* Top-level domain (TLD) of the website */,
  "idn_domain" TEXT /* Internationalized domain name (IDN) of the website */,
  "idn_tld" TEXT /* Internationalized top-level domain (IDN TLD) of the website */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the website */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the website */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the website was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the website was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_tld FOREIGN KEY ("tld") REFERENCES tlds ("tld_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website being ranked */,
  "global_rank" INTEGER /* Current global rank of the website */,
  "tld_rank" INTEGER /* Current TLD-specific rank of the website */,
  "ref_subnets" INTEGER /* Number of referring subnets for the website */,
  "ref_ips" INTEGER /* Number of referring IP addresses for the website */,
  "prev_global_rank" INTEGER /* Previous global rank of the website */,
  "prev_tld_rank" INTEGER /* Previous TLD-specific rank of the website */,
  "prev_ref_subnets" INTEGER /* Previous number of referring subnets for the website */,
  "prev_ref_ips" INTEGER /* Previous number of referring IP addresses for the website */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was recorded */,
  "crawl_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was crawled */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_rankings" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical ranking entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website being ranked */,
  "global_rank" INTEGER /* Global rank of the website */,
  "tld_rank" INTEGER /* TLD-specific rank of the website */,
  "ref_subnets" INTEGER /* Number of referring subnets for the website */,
  "ref_ips" INTEGER /* Number of referring IP addresses for the website */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was recorded */,
  "crawl_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was crawled */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_rankings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website receiving the referral */,
  "subnet" TEXT /* Subnet address of the referral */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the referral */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date when the referral was recorded */,
  "referral_type" TEXT /* Type of referral (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "referer_url" TEXT /* URL of the referring page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tlds" (
  "tld_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLD */,
  "tld_name" TEXT /* Name of the TLD */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TLD */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the TLD (e.g., generic, country-code) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the TLD was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the TLD was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role name */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role permission was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)
